# workbench_group (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "workbench_group" "my_group" {
  group_name = "my-global-group"
}

data "workbench_group" "my_org_group" {
  group_name                  = "my-org-group"
  organization_user_facing_id = "my-org"
}

output "my_group" {
  value = data.workbench_group.my_group
}

output "my_org_group" {
  value = data.workbench_group.my_org_group
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_name` (String) Name of the group

### Optional

- `organization_user_facing_id` (String) Organization UFID of the group

### Read-Only

- `created_by` (String) Workbench workspace created by
- `created_date` (String) Workbench workspace created date
- `description` (String) Description of the group
- `expiration_days` (Number) Number of days until the group expires
- `expiration_notification` (Boolean) Whether to notify the user when the group expires
- `group_email` (String) Email of the group
- `internal_name` (String) Internal name of the group
- `last_updated_by` (String) Workbench workspace last updated by
- `last_updated_date` (String) Workbench workspace last updated date
- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID of the group
- `require_grant_reason` (Boolean) Whether to require a reason for granting access
- `sync_group` (Boolean) Whether to sync the google group
